_comment: Procedure cost generation queue. Each entry produces ONE JSON file under content/data/procedures/<slug>.json via the coveredusa-procedure-writer agent. Status starts as 'queued', flips to 'writing' when picked up, 'verified' when verifier approves, 'flagged' when verifier flags for review.

procedures.name: CT Scan
procedures.notes: Outpatient CT, common scans (head, chest, abdomen). Site-of-service spread similar to MRI. Verify CMS 2026 PFS rate.

procedures.name: Colonoscopy
procedures.notes: Note screening vs diagnostic distinction (ACA covers screening at 100%, diagnostic has cost-sharing). Strong angle on patient-facing surprise billing.

procedures.name: Mammogram
procedures.notes: Screening covered at 100% under ACA preventive care. Diagnostic mammogram has cost-sharing. 2D vs 3D (tomosynthesis) pricing differs.

procedures.name: X-Ray
procedures.notes: Most common imaging. Wide regional variance. Multiple body parts (chest, hand, foot, etc.).

procedures.name: Ultrasound
procedures.notes: Multiple types: abdominal, pelvic, OB, vascular, echocardiogram. Pricing varies by type.

procedures.name: Echocardiogram
procedures.notes: Cardiac ultrasound. Higher cost than abdominal. Site-of-service spread important.

procedures.name: Emergency Room Visit
procedures.notes: Tiered by severity (level 1-5). Wide cost variance ($150 to $3,000+ for facility fee alone). Strong angle on surprise billing protections under No Surprises Act.

procedures.name: Urgent Care Visit
procedures.notes: Alternative to ER for non-emergencies. $100-$300 typical.

procedures.name: Physical Therapy
procedures.notes: Per-session pricing. Common after surgery/injury. Insurance often limits sessions per year.

procedures.name: Upper Endoscopy (EGD)
procedures.notes: Diagnostic upper GI procedure. Site-of-service spread, anesthesia separately billed.
